description_long: This object is a firearm with a distinctive combination of dark metal and wood textures, featuring a long cylindrical barrel, a wooden foregrip, and a curved magazine. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from matte black metal, while the stock, pistol grip, and handguard are made of polished brown wood. The magazine is curved and appears to be detachable, typical of certain automatic rifles. The front sight is a simple post, and the rear sight is integrated into the receiver. The overall design is robust, with a full wooden stock and a prominent trigger guard. The object is detailed with visible screws and seams, giving it a realistic, utilitarian appearance.
description: A dark metal and wood firearm with a long barrel, curved magazine, and full wooden stock, featuring a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the wooden foregrip beneath the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full wooden stock, curved magazine, and the overall length of the firearm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the width of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the trigger guard and magazine.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
